items.note: Reusable ops precedent (fresh-scaffold over git-history surgery for an early-stage, no-external-consumer repo); no overlap with D1-D4.
Standing ops policy (archive+bundle-backup, gate deletion on replacement proven); distinct subject from D1-D4.
Reusable data-hygiene practice for renames touching historical telemetry/logs; unrelated to D1-D4.
This candidate IS the source event that produced docs/watchtower/DECISIONS.md D1-D4 verbatim (same story_reference 1f8758f3, same date 2026-05-27) — fully covered by the real existing record.

Extends D1's bare 'watcher' concept with concrete execution-model detail not stated in D1 (queue+in-session-polling, never headless/metered-billing) — additive, not duplicate; shared subject (trigger mechanism) but different grain, per shared-noun rule.
Standing placement convention overriding a skill's own default, with documented open tension feeding a future DF-6 spec.
Major architecture decision (job-state -> Switchboard-hosted state plane); no overlap with narrow Watchtower-v0 D1-D4.
Architecture clarification (CRUD vs 'never kill' scope) for Switchboard; distinct from D1-D4.
Standing build technique (adversarial A-vs-B delta) adopted as first-class method; unrelated to D1-D4.
Constellation-wide architecture taxonomy decision; distinct subject from D1-D4.
Process/architecture decision splitting app-build into two lanes with a defined seam; unrelated to D1-D4.
Policy decision on how to treat an unstable SDK dependency; unrelated to D1-D4.
Major harness-adoption decision (per-mechanism hybrid promotion vs wholesale); unrelated to Watchtower-v0 D1-D4.
Real design decision from a PoC (HyperFrames as shared engine for video+interactive decks), pending a build go; unrelated to D1-D4.
One-off gating call for a single specific build's sequencing ('is a separate review still needed before this one build') — transient scoping decision, not a reusable architecture choice.
Architecture decision (comprehend/render phase split, provenance via path+commit_sha) for a new subsystem; unrelated to D1-D4.
Standing security/ops policy for all future Swagger spawns; unrelated to D1-D4's decisions (D1-D4 don't address permission model).
Architecture decision on worker lifecycle management (registry+reaper+grace window); unrelated to D1-D4.
Major architecture decision for the factory's comms bus (SSE broker + in-session listeners); unrelated to D1-D4.
Standing process decision (spec-then-build discipline, registry shape); unrelated to D1-D4.
Standing session-management decision (files over compaction); unrelated to D1-D4.
Scoped, one-off doc-cleanup task-sequencing call for one specific docset (banner now, defer physical re-home) — tactical, not a standing architecture rule.

Real design decision (locked defaults for a proposed audit skill) at the time it was made; later superseded by cand-024's decision not to build it — kept as its own historical decision, not dropped, per 'default to new when unsure.'
Real decision reversing cand-023's plan once doc-drift/doc-review skills were found to already cover the same checks; unrelated to D1-D4.
Architecture split decision for AngelEye (design spec only, not yet built); unrelated to D1-D4.

Same-day, same-subject as cand-007 (both: move job-state to Switchboard) from a different session — likely a near-duplicate pair worth a human merge pass, but neither matches the real existing D1-D4 record, so both surfaced as new per the safe-bias rule.
Standing operational decision (billing-driven: interactive claude only, never -p/headless); unrelated to D1-D4's scope.
Design-system decision (two-layer colour model) codified into docs/david-design-patterns.md; unrelated to D1-D4.
Tooling placement decision with an explicitly open follow-up question; still a real decision (where design-lint currently lives), unrelated to D1-D4.

Explicitly an unratified DRAFT proposal ('DRAFT for decision — not yet ticketed') — commissioning a brief is process/logistics, not itself an architecture decision; the actual build question remains open.

Rescued by adversarial drop-review: only record of the full-name-not-abbreviation jump-alias convention, prevents re-litigation on every future app addition. Original noise call misjudged durability by scale.
Substantial roadmap/priority decision (read-gate over more KDD-write tooling, concrete 5-step sequence); unrelated to D1-D4.
Spec-methodology decision (hybrid appydave:spec-writer + Osmani structural elements); unrelated to D1-D4.
Standing methodology decision (prove N=1 before generalizing); unrelated to D1-D4.
Major architecture decision (identity-based parallelism sequence, reject per-file locking); unrelated to D1-D4.
Naming/placement architecture decision (apps/watchtower canonical vs experiments/ PoC); distinct subject from D1-D4 (D1-D4 govern the v0 mechanism, not the folder/home question).
Sequencing/priority decision (observability-return-leg before auto-trigger); unrelated to D1-D4.
Product decision for the Mocha Census tool (rating-scale redesign); unrelated to D1-D4.
Design-system investment decision backed by evidence; unrelated to D1-D4.

Proposal-stage decision (execution deferred) for the same consolidation cand-044 later executed same day — likely a proposal/execution pair worth a human merge pass, but kept as new per safe-bias rule; unrelated to D1-D4.
Deliberate standing behavior choice (CONTEXT.md stays read-on-demand, not auto-loaded) with ongoing consequences for every session; unrelated to D1-D4.
Placement/architecture rule (writeups vs actual clones, corrected mid-session); unrelated to D1-D4.
Spec-scoping decision (detect-and-tell only, never auto-commit/auto-gitignore); unrelated to D1-D4.
Executed version of the comprehend-visualise consolidation (commit 7d9eb29); see note on cand-040 for the related proposal-stage duplicate; unrelated to D1-D4.
Standing observability decision (structured failure register vs prose narration); unrelated to D1-D4.

Naming/lineage design decision with concrete porting implications (what structural machinery to adopt from BMAD Swagger); distinct from D4's narrow 'v0 ships buttons-only' scope — does not conflict since it's a longer-term aspiration, not a 'build conversational Swagger now' directive.

UI/flow architecture decision for the Floor<->Lanes bridge's own 'promote' button; shares the word 'promote' with D3 but is a different subject/layer (concept-lane synthesis vs Watchtower's canonical-record promotion) per the shared-noun rule — not a duplicate/conflict of D3.
Well-evidenced recurring pattern (6 recurrences) with no existing pattern record to compare against.
Well-evidenced recurring pattern (4 recurrences) with no existing pattern record to compare against.
Genuine architecture learning (atomic rename-mutex, verified via concurrency stress test).
Genuine architecture learning (manifest files vs LLM relay for bulk/ID-bearing data).
Genuine architecture/process learning (placement-first heuristic for shared-state fixes).
Genuine, high-severity technical learning about KBDE extension mountability vs schema validation.
Genuine architecture learning about the Mochaccino gallery index's manual-curation gap.
Genuine architecture learning (Switchboard's inbound routes verified by reading source).
Genuine, specific JS debugging gotcha with clear prevention.
Genuine debugging learning (status-field vocabulary mismatch).
Genuine, reusable CSS/flexbox debugging gotcha.
Genuine, reusable Node.js ESM gotcha (guard side effects behind entrypoint check).
Genuine JS TDZ ordering gotcha with clear prevention.
Genuine debugging learning (regex path-depth assumption, verified count discrepancy).
Genuine, high-value environment gotcha (PATH stripped in piped/looped Bash-tool subshells).
Genuine, high-severity documentation learning with a concrete audit + fix method.
Genuine learning about durable-memory staleness after a real-world rename.
Genuine infrastructure learning (diagnosed, fix proposed but not yet applied).
Genuine, high-severity Workflow-tool gotcha (args binding failure) with clear prevention.
Genuine incident learning; root cause unconfirmed but recovery + prevention documented.
Genuine infrastructure learning about claim-binding races under parallel dispatch.
Genuine tooling-contention learning with a practical fallback-verification technique.
Genuine process learning (scoped git add over blanket add in a shared tree).
Genuine process learning (verify build-provenance claims against git log, don't generalize).
Genuine, high-value process learning (verify causal claims against primary evidence, not timing correlation).
Genuine process learning (design-origin docs beat transcript-mining for charter grounding).
Genuine, valuable process learning (render/lint gates must cover the gallery index, not just named artifacts).
Genuine process learning (validate a judgment rubric against real quantified data, not a handful of examples).
Genuine, high-value process learning (never trust worker self-report; instrument the loop externally).
Genuine, high-value process learning (cold-start orient/ask vs mid-session act, with a concrete skill-doc fix).
Genuine, reusable research-prompt-design learning.
Genuine process learning about fanning out agents without a shared ratified contract.
Genuine, valuable process learning (verify repo identity via GitHub id, not name/description).
Genuine process learning about unenforced commit discipline.
Genuine, valuable process learning (workers resolve+terminate, never interview the human).
Genuine, if narrow, testing learning about crossref-scanner false positives on literal syntax examples.
Genuine, high-severity testing learning (render-health gate needed before trusting screenshots as design signal).
Genuine, common tooling gotcha (cwd persistence across Bash tool calls).
Genuine tooling learning; root cause identified, fix flagged as outstanding.
Genuine tooling learning (human-authored prose paths vs machine-verified paths).
Genuine, reusable git technique for safe pulls with local edits.
Genuine, high-value harness-behavior gotcha (Read tool required before Write, cat doesn't count).
Genuine, valuable meta-learning (retrieval-trigger is the weak link, not memory existence).
Genuine, reusable parsing-hygiene learning.
Genuine design/process learning tied to a concrete re-render fix.
Genuine, valuable tooling learning (scanner scope gap, fixed with a reconciliation script).
Genuine, classic shell-portability gotcha (zsh vs bash word-splitting).
